calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2003 Continued To Sep-15-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/15/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Sara Lerschen, CSR # 6213. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
